chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-1818 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No.8218/2022 2. For hearing of main case 02.06.2022 M/s.Sardar M. Ishaque, & Amjad Hayat, Advocates for the Petitioners. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. Mr. M. Rashid Arfi, Advocate for the Respondent. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After hearing the petition at some length, we with the consent of the parties, pass the following order. i. That the Department would issue Delay Detention Certificate in favour of the petitioner up till the period goods were out of customs charge. ii. That the said certificate would be issued within seven days’ time from the date of receipt of this order. With these directions the instant petition alongwith the listed and pending application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
